Business banking /
Payment solutions /
In-person payments /
Point of sale

POINT OF SALE

Turn your payments into a $400 statement credit.1

Enjoy seamless POS payment processing throughout your business to start earning your $400 statement credit.

  • Custom POS solutions for different industries

  • Flexible plans and no long-term contracts

  • Integration capabilities to synchronize data

Compare options Call us

BONUS OFFER

Get your $400 statement credit in 4 simple steps1

How it works:

 

  1. Open a new U.S. Bank Payment Solutions account between April 1, 2026 and June 30, 2026.
  2. Authorize and settle at least $5,000 in payment transactions within 60 days of account opening.
  3. Receive a one‑time $400 statement credit within 60 days after if your account is open, active and in good standing.
  4. Call today at 844-841-1114 to get started.

 

  •

Experience the power of U.S. Bank
POS solutions.

Streamline and automate tasks

Plan employee schedules, set inventory alerts and streamline daily business tasks with a range of business management tools.

Control cash flow

Generate real-time reports to understand every aspect of your business including labor cost analysis.

Accept a variety of payments

Accept all major credit and debit cards, contactless payments and digital wallet.

Boost your business with a full–service POS solution.

Pick a plan that aligns with your business needs and customize it along the way as your business scales. The hardware fee for each plan varies depending on the device selected and if purchased or rented. Add additional software for $29 per month per software license.

 

Transaction, hardware and sales tax fees may still apply.2

Competitive rates. Better value.

Learn about our transaction fee rates so you get the most for your money. Transaction, hardware and sales tax fees may still apply.2

Swipe, tap, insert
2.60% + 10¢

For physical or tap-to-pay card payments made by customer.

Manual Transaction
3.50% + 15¢

For card payments where you enter manual card details for customer in person or over-the-phone.

Online Payments
2.90% + 30¢

For digital or ecommerce purchases online.

Explore top POS features to help scale your business.

Online ordering

Increase revenue with easy online ordering. Set up your own mobile-friendly website in minutes, showcase your products and start taking orders right away.

Learn more

Appointment booking

Drive sales and improve staff efficiency with fully automated appointment booking software.

Learn more

Retail gift cards

Grow sales with gift cards. Choose between e-gift cards or physical cards branded with your logo and design to generate additional revenue.

Learn more

Online invoicing

Generate invoices, send them via email and accept payments online with our invoicing software, so you get paid faster.

Learn more

Optimize data by integrating business apps to your POS dashboard.

POS systems can be integrated with a variety of business management software so that you can seamlessly synchronize your data across platforms, minimizing manual data entry and preventing potential errors. Integration with payroll software helps you track working hours, handle direct deposits and ensure timely salary payments.

Learn more

POS hardware tailored to your business needs.

From mobile card readers and handheld terminals to full-service POS registers, U.S. Bank offers flexible POS hardware solutions, giving your customers a secure and efficient purchasing experience. For businesses that need more advanced solutions, we also offer several hardware options and accessories that can be added to our set-price plans to create a tailored solution.

See details

Frequently asked questions

Get all the benefits of a cloud-based point-of-sale solution. Track your sales data in real-time so you can see how your business is doing at home or at the beach, wherever and whenever you need to. Analyze the health of your business across revenue, product and staff metrics.

U.S. Bank Payment Solutions has highly trained support teams available 24/7/365 to help whenever you need it. Each of our merchant services customers is assigned a dedicated Customer Account Manager to work with their business.

With end-to-end encryption, your customer data is protected by the latest security technology which is compatible with contactless payments, chip and pin, Apple Pay®, Google Pay® and Samsung Pay®.

Help your business mitigate the risk of potential data breaches and the resulting reputational and financial loss with contactless payments. Tokenization, contactless cards and mobile wallets provide stronger security than traditional payment methods. A token replaces a cardholder’s payment card numbers, rendering the payment information useless to hackers, making theft of card present transaction data more difficult.

Explore related products & offerings.

payment solutions

Explore U.S. Bank's payment solutions by industry to find point-of-sale systems, merchant services and software features designed for businesses like yours.

in-person payments

Payment Processor

U.S. Bank’s payment processor offers the fastest funding time. Funds are deposited into your U.S. Bank checking account within hours with Everyday Funding.

payment solutions

Payment integrations

Streamline payments, payroll, and accounting with U.S. Bank’s integrated POS solutions. Connect with tools like QuickBooks®, Gusto™, and Elavon APIs.

Explore locations

Find the U.S. Bank branch nearest you.

Make an appointment

Schedule a virtual or in-person meeting with a business banker.

Request a call

Fill in details about your banking needs and a representative will call you.

Call us

Call 800-432-9413 to talk with a representative right away.

Start of disclosure content
Footnote
Return to content, Footnote

Disclosures

  1. Open a new U.S. Bank Payment Solutions merchant account between April 1st, 2026 and June 30th, 2026, process at least $5,000 in net settled transactions within 60 days of approval and receive a $400 statement credit. Credit is applied within 60 days after reaching $5,000, provided your account remains open, active, and in good standing with no outstanding recovery balance. Limit one credit per Merchant ID; offer is valid for U.S. merchants only. Available to new payment processing accounts for customers not currently using U.S. Bank and/or Elavon (a U.S. Bank company) for merchant processing. Cannot be combined with other promotions. Certain business types, Association Partners, Business Essentials customers and registered Payment Facilitators are ineligible. U.S. Bank may modify or end this offer at any time; additional restrictions may apply.

  2. U.S. Bank Payment Solutions are powered by Elavon, a wholly owned subsidiary of U.S. Bank NA. Elavon assesses the following transaction fees, depending on the acceptance method for the credit card payment:

    Swipe, tap, insert: 2.60% of transaction amount + 10 ¢ per item
    Manual transaction: 3.50% of transaction amount + 15 ¢ per item
    Online payments: 2.90% of transaction amount + 30 ¢ per item

    Disclosed transaction fees apply for online applications. Transaction fees may vary and other fees may apply for accounts not opened online.

Start of disclosure content

Everyday Funding is available at no additional charge to U.S. Bank Payment Solutions merchants with a U.S. Bank Business Checking account. Funding speed is dependent on batch times and will be processed every day, including weekends and holidays. Activation may take between three to five business days from date of Everyday Funding service request. Once the file is activated, there will be a change in the description of the payment when it is posted to your bank account.

Deposit products are offered by U.S. Bank National Association. Member FDIC.

Services may be subject to credit approval. Eligibility requirements, restrictions and fees may apply. See a business banker for details.

Apple Pay is a registered trademark of Apple Inc. App Store is a service mark of Apple Inc.

Google Pay, Android and Google Play are trademarks of Google LLC. Fitbit Pay is a trademark of Fitbit LLC and/or its affiliates.

Samsung Pay is a registered trademark of Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd.

U.S. Bank Payment Solutions are powered by Elavon, a wholly owned subsidiary of U.S. Bank NA, and may have different privacy and security policies than U.S. Bank. For additional details, refer to the information found on the U.S. Bank Payment Solutions Privacy & Terms of Service page.
